Sat Mar 15

Blues on the Green

Zilker Park
7:00pm - 10:00pm
Free
Music

Austin's favorite free outdoor concert series returns with a stellar lineup of local and touring acts. Bring blankets and lawn chairs.

Sat Mar 15

East Austin Studio Tour

Various East Austin Locations
11:00am - 6:00pm
Free
Arts

Self-guided tour of over 400 artist studios across East Austin. Family-friendly with interactive art activities for kids at select locations.

Sun Mar 16

HOPE Farmers Market

Plaza Saltillo
11:00am - 3:00pm
Free admission
Community

Weekly outdoor farmers market featuring local produce, artisan goods, live music, and food trucks. Dog-friendly and family-friendly.
